definition_hi: ऐसा वाक्यांश जिसका अर्थ उसके शब्दों के सीधे अर्थ से अलग हो, उसे idiom कहते हैं।
title: Idiom, Phrase & Expression System ()

categories.name: (मुहावरा, वाक्यांश एवं अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
spoken English
translation intelligence
vocabulary intelligence
समझ लिया।
अब हम English के उस भाग में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ: language “book English” से निकलकर “real native expression” बनती है।
क्योंकि: native speakers: हर समय direct sentence नहीं बोलते।
वे:
idioms
phrasal verbs
expressions
conversational phrases
का उपयोग करते हैं।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 34
categories.intro:
Student:
idioms समझ सके
phrasal verbs use कर सके
conversational expressions पहचान सके
natural English बोल सके
figurative English समझ सके
native-style communication पकड़ सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Idiom System
2. Phrasal Verb System
3. Conversational Expression System
4. Daily Spoken Phrase System
5. Figurative English System
6. Emotion-Based Expression System
7. Native Reaction Expression System
8. Formal & Informal Expression System
9. Contextual Phrase System
10. Real-Life Expression Drill System

categories.name: 1. Idiom System
categories.intro: (मुहावरा प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is an Idiom?
categories.intro:
English Definition
An idiom is a group of words whose meaning is different from the literal meaning of the individual words.

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro: Break the ice

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: बर्फ तोड़ना

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro:
बातचीत शुरू करना
झिझक खत्म करना

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
He told a joke to break the ice.
उसने झिझक खत्म करने के लिए मजाक किया।

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro: Hit the nail on the head

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: कील के सिर पर मारना

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: बिल्कुल सही बात कहना

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
You hit the nail on the head.
तुमने बिल्कुल सही बात कही।

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro: Once in a blue moon

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: नीले चाँद में एक बार

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: बहुत कम

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
He visits us once in a blue moon.
वह हमसे बहुत कम मिलने आता है।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Idioms: direct translation से नहीं समझे जाते।

categories.name: 2. Phrasal Verb System
categories.intro: (वाक्यांश क्रिया प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is a Phrasal Verb?
categories.intro: Verb + preposition/adverb मिलकर नया meaning बनाते हैं।

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro: Give up

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: दे देना ऊपर

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: हार मान लेना

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
Never give up.
कभी हार मत मानो।

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro: Look after

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: देखभाल करना

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
She looks after her grandmother.
वह अपनी दादी की देखभाल करती है।

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro: Run away

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: भाग जाना

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
The thief ran away.
चोर भाग गया।

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro: Find out

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: पता लगाना

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
I found out the truth.
मुझे सच्चाई पता चल गई।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Phrasal verbs: spoken English में बहुत common हैं।

categories.name: 3. Conversational Expression System
categories.intro: (वार्तालाप अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Greetings
categories.intro:
What’s up?
क्या हाल है?
How’s it going?
सब कैसा चल रहा है?

categories.name: Casual Replies
categories.intro:
Not much.
कुछ खास नहीं।
Pretty good.
काफी अच्छा।

categories.name: Agreement
categories.intro:
Absolutely!
बिल्कुल!
Exactly!
सही कहा!

categories.name: Surprise
categories.intro:
No way!
ऐसा नहीं हो सकता!
Seriously?
सच में?

categories.name: Excitement
categories.intro:
Awesome!
शानदार!
That’s amazing!
यह अद्भुत है!

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Conversation English: grammar से ज्यादा expression-driven होती है।

categories.name: 4. Daily Spoken Phrase System
categories.intro: (दैनिक बोलचाल वाक्यांश प्रणाली)

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Take care.
अपना ध्यान रखना।
See you soon.
जल्दी मिलते हैं।
Come on!
चलो!
Hold on.
रुको।
Wait a minute.
एक मिनट रुको।
No problem.
कोई समस्या नहीं।
Sounds good.
अच्छा लग रहा है।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: ये phrases: daily spoken English की backbone हैं।

categories.name: 5. Figurative English System
categories.intro: (लाक्षणिक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro: Time is money.

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: समय पैसा है।

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: समय बहुत मूल्यवान है।

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro: He has a heart of stone.

categories.name: Literal Meaning
categories.intro: उसका दिल पत्थर का है।

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: वह बहुत कठोर व्यक्ति है।

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro: The classroom was a zoo.

categories.name: Real Meaning
categories.intro: कक्षा बहुत शोरगुल वाली थी।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Figurative English: imagination और comparison का उपयोग करती है।

categories.name: 6. Emotion-Based Expression System
categories.intro: (भाव आधारित अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Anger
categories.intro:
I’m fed up with this.
मैं इससे तंग आ चुका हूँ।

categories.name: Happiness
categories.intro:
I’m on cloud nine.
मैं बहुत खुश हूँ।

categories.name: Sadness
categories.intro:
I feel broken.
मैं अंदर से टूटा हुआ महसूस कर रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Fear
categories.intro:
My heart skipped a beat.
मैं अचानक डर गया।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Emotion expressions: spoken English को natural बनाते हैं।

categories.name: 7. Native Reaction Expression System
categories.intro: (मूल वक्ता प्रतिक्रिया अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Shock
categories.intro:
Oh my God!
हे भगवान!

categories.name: Doubt
categories.intro:
Are you sure?
क्या तुम्हें यकीन है?

categories.name: Disbelief
categories.intro:
You must be kidding.
तुम मजाक कर रहे हो।

categories.name: Appreciation
categories.intro:
That’s impressive.
यह प्रभावशाली है।

categories.name: Sympathy
categories.intro:
That’s unfortunate.
यह दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण है।

categories.name: 8. Formal & Informal Expression System
categories.intro: (औपचारिक एवं अनौपचारिक अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: InformalFormal
categories.intro:
ThanksThank you
ByeGoodbye
What’s up?How are you?
SorryI apologize
Help meCould you assist me?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: हर situation: same expression नहीं मांगती।

categories.name: 9. Contextual Phrase System
categories.intro: (संदर्भ आधारित वाक्यांश प्रणाली)

categories.name: At Restaurant
categories.intro:
Could I see the menu?
क्या मैं menu देख सकता हूँ?

categories.name: At School
categories.intro:
May I come in?
क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ?

categories.name: On Phone
categories.intro:
Can you hear me clearly?
क्या आप मुझे साफ सुन पा रहे हैं?

categories.name: During Discussion
categories.intro:
I agree with your point.
मैं आपकी बात से सहमत हूँ।

categories.name: During Debate
categories.intro:
I respectfully disagree.
मैं सम्मानपूर्वक असहमत हूँ।

categories.name: 10. Real-Life Expression Drill System
categories.intro: (वास्तविक जीवन अभिव्यक्ति अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Situation 1 — Excitement
categories.intro:
A: I passed the exam.
B: That’s amazing!

categories.name: Situation 2 — Sympathy
categories.intro:
A: I lost my wallet.
B: That’s unfortunate.

categories.name: Situation 3 — Suggestion
categories.intro:
A: I’m tired.
B: You should take some rest.

categories.name: Situation 4 — Disbelief
categories.intro:
A: I won a lottery.
B: No way!

categories.name: Situation 5 — Encouragement
categories.intro:
A: I’m afraid of speaking English.
B: Don’t worry. Keep practicing.

categories.name: Important Idiom & Phrase Master List
categories.intro:
Break the ice
Give up
Look after
Find out
Run away
Hold on
Take care
No problem
Sounds good
On cloud nine
Fed up
Hit the nail on the head
Once in a blue moon

categories.name: Final Expression Intelligence Formula
categories.intro:
Vocabulary
+
Context
+
Emotion
+
Phrasal Verbs
+
Idioms
+
Natural Expressions
Native-Like English Communication

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 34
categories.intro:
Student:
idioms समझ सके
phrasal verbs use कर सके
natural expressions बोल सके
figurative English समझ सके
conversational English improve कर सके
native-style reactions समझ सके
expressive communication कर सके
real spoken fluency विकसित कर सके।
